code.text: Irreversible pulpitis — Tooth #3 (Upper Right First Molar)

note.text: Patient presented with increasing pain in upper right area x 1 week. Clinical and radiographic examination confirmed irreversible pulpitis on Tooth #3. Tooth non-responsive to cold reversal. Periapical radiographs reveal periapical changes consistent with pulpal involvement. Root canal therapy recommended. Palliative treatment (D9110) provided at initial visit. Prior authorization requested for D3330 (molar RCT) and D2740 (porcelain/ceramic crown).

resource.name: AnthemDentalPriorAuthEndoCrown
resource.publisher: Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Kentucky [SYNTHETIC]
resource.title: Anthem Dental PPO — Prior Authorization: Endodontic + Crown Services

answer.valueString: Patient Laura Jennings presented June 3, 2026 with increasing pain in upper right quadrant x 1 week. Clinical examination and periapical radiography confirm irreversible pulpitis on Tooth #3 (upper right first molar). Tooth non-responsive to cold reversal testing. Periapical radiographs reveal periapical changes consistent with pulpal necrosis. Significant decay present compromising coronal structure. Palliative emergency treatment (D9110) provided at initial visit. Root canal therapy (D3330) is clinically necessary to eliminate infection and preserve the tooth. Following successful obturation, a porcelain/ceramic crown (D2740) is required to restore full occlusal function and protect the endodontically treated tooth from fracture. Core buildup (D2393) requested contingent on assessment of remaining tooth structure at time of crown preparation.

Periapical radiographs (D0220 + D0230) taken June 3, 2026. Radiograph attachment reference: urn:uuid:documentreference-periapical-xray. Findings: Periapical radiolucency at apex of Tooth #3 consistent with pulpal pathology. Significant carious lesion involving mesial and occlusal surfaces. Existing restoration noted. No root resorption detected.

Significant carious lesion with existing restoration compromises coronal structure. Insufficient tooth structure anticipated at time of crown preparation to support crown without buildup. D2393 requested as conditionally required; final determination to be made at crown preparation appointment with supporting clinical documentation.

processNote.text: D2393 (Resin buildup) processed as Class II Basic, covered at 80%. Conditional authorization under ANT-PREAUTH-2026-JNG001 satisfied — clinical documentation confirming insufficient tooth structure accepted. Allowed $200.00.

D2740 (Crown, porcelain/ceramic) processed as Class IV Major service, covered at 50%. Allowed $1,050.00 per predetermination ANT-PREAUTH-2026-JNG001. Crown frequency limitation confirmed — no prior crown on Tooth #3.
Annual deductible of $50.00 fully met at initial visit (2026-06-03). No deductible applied to this claim.
Total plan paid this claim: $685.00 ($160 for D2393 + $525 for D2740). Total member liability this claim: $565.00 ($40 for D2393 + $525 for D2740).

supportingInfo.valueString: D2393 CONDITIONAL APPROVAL SATISFIED: Clinical examination at crown preparation (2026-07-15) confirmed less than 40% remaining coronal tooth structure on Tooth #3 following endodontic access and caries excavation. Core buildup with resin composite placed to restore adequate retention form for crown. Clinical narrative: 'Endodontically treated 2026-06-17. Estimated 35% coronal structure remaining. Buildup required for crown retention.' Post-obturation periapical on file confirms successful obturation. Authorization ANT-PREAUTH-2026-JNG001 line 3 condition satisfied.

Crown seat date: 2026-07-15. Crown type: Porcelain/ceramic (all-ceramic). Lab case reference: HFD-LAB-2026-0715-003. No prior crown on Tooth #3 on record. Plan frequency limitation (1 crown per tooth per 5 years) satisfied.

processNote.text: D0140, D0220, D0230, D9110 processed as Class II Basic services, covered at 80% in-network after deductible.
Annual individual deductible of $50.00 applied in full to line 1 (D0140). Deductible now fully met for plan year 2026.
D9110 benefit category assumed Class II Basic per standard PPO plan design. Verify against plan document for production use.
Irreversible pulpitis diagnosed on Tooth #3. Prior authorization request submitted for D3330 (molar RCT) and D2740 (porcelain crown). See prior authorization bundle ANT-PREAUTH-2026-JNG001.

processNote.text: D3330 (Root canal therapy, molar) processed under prior authorization ANT-PREAUTH-2026-JNG001. Allowed amount $975.00 per predetermination. Covered at 80% as Basic service.
Annual deductible of $50.00 was satisfied at initial visit (2026-06-03). No deductible applied to this claim.

Post-obturation radiograph on file. Crown claim (D2740) may be submitted following healing period. Reference preAuthRef ANT-PREAUTH-2026-JNG001 on crown claim. Core buildup (D2393) conditionally authorized — submit with clinical narrative at time of crown preparation.

processNote.text: Authorization Number: ANT-PREAUTH-2026-JNG001. Valid: 2026-06-10 through 2026-12-31. This authorization number must appear in the preAuthRef field of all claims submitted for D3330, D2740, and D2393 for member JNG5027741 on Tooth #3.

Estimated member liability: D3330 $195.00 + D2740 $525.00 + D2393 $40.00 (if condition met) = $760.00. Actual amounts will be determined at time of adjudication based on deductible status. Annual deductible of $50.00 was met at initial visit (2026-06-03). No deductible will apply to treatment claims.

Billing sequence requirement: D3330 must be billed on a separate date from D2740. D2393 must be billed on the same date as D2740 (crown preparation/delivery), NOT on the date of D3330 (root canal). Failure to follow this sequence will result in claim denial.
Crown frequency limitation: Patient's plan allows one crown per tooth per 5-year period. No prior crown on Tooth #3 on record. Frequency limitation satisfied.
